summary: Completed frontend testing of ResCue dashboard UI updates. All requested features are working correctly: Timer icons on expiry badges, 'Not Applicable' for Grant Approval Period when study has no funds, horizontal bar chart on Grants page, summary panel without colored background, optional grant section in Add Study modal, and free-text Phase input.
passed_tests: Timer icon appears next to IRB Approval Period badge in Study Detail page (verified with 2 Timer icons found)
Timer icon appears next to Grant Approval Period badge when study has funds
Grant Approval Period shows 'Not Applicable' text when study has no funds/grants (verified by creating TestNoGrant study)
Grants page shows horizontal bar chart for fund categories (Manpower, Equipment, Miscellaneous, Travel) using Recharts BarChart with layout='vertical'
Grants page summary panel has no colored background - uses 'border border-border' class instead of getBudgetBgColor()
Add Study modal allows creating study without grant - 'This study has a grant' checkbox controls visibility of grant fields
Phase field in Add Study modal is free-text input with placeholder 'e.g., Phase I, Phase II, Pilot, etc.'
Fund Overview section shows 'No Grant' badge when study has no grant
Dashboard page loads correctly with all metric cards
seed_data_creation: Created temporary TestNoGrant study to verify 'Not Applicable' feature - study was automatically cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested UI features have been implemented and verified: 1) Timer icons from lucide-react added to IRB and Grant Approval Period badges in StudyDetail.jsx (lines 1163-1177), 2) Conditional rendering shows 'Not Applicable' when totalBudget is 0 (line 1180), 3) Grants.jsx uses Recharts BarChart with layout='vertical' for horizontal bar visualization, 4) Summary panel uses 'border border-border' class without colored background, 5) AddStudyModal in AllStudies.jsx has optional grant checkbox and free-text Phase input
